3239990.name: Our Church and Halloween RPG - Episode One
3239990.description:
Our Church and Halloween RPG (Episode One) is a short, story driven, 2D adventure game. You play as James, who can move in four directions, along with having a button to talk to other characters or investigate objects. As you play the game, more characters will join your group. Can you complete this episode of the game?

[Our Church and Halloween RPG (Episode One) Story]
James must get to the mountain before Halloween, but can he do it? But why does he need to get there?
